name: bosc-deckgl-corridor-spike
description: Issue #70 spike — DeckGL vs Leaflet for the BOSC corridor map. The runnable proof is index.html (no install); these deps are for the CorridorMap.tsx production-shape reference, to be dropped into the Astro app from #63.
//: NOT installed during the spike (disk was full). Versions pinned to the deck.gl 9.x line that index.html also uses.
